blurb: Vigorous, flexible-caned roses that 'wander' over fences & arbors in one big flush — plant named cultivars, not invasive wild multiflora rose.
spread: Long arching canes scramble & self-layer — give it room
seasons: One lavish early-summer flush (most types); some hips & arching canes in winter
wildlife: Clustered single blooms draw bees; hips feed birds
